ShortDescription.Value: A compact traffic inspection mod for quickly viewing traffic composition on roads, railways, metro lines, and buildings. / 一个紧凑的交通信息查看模组，可快速查看道路、铁路、地铁和建筑的交通构成。

Publish.LongDescription: Transit Scope Transit Scope is an information-inspection mod designed to help players quickly select and inspect the traffic composition of different transport systems in the game, making traffic planning easier and more intuitive. Transit Scope 是一个信息查看类模组，主要用于在游戏中快速选择并查看各类交通流量的占比信息，可以帮助玩家更好地规划交通 This mod is the spiritual successor to the original Traffic Volume. 本模组是一代 Traffic Volume 的继任者。 Please note: there is currently an issue where selecting large, multi-part building objects may display “No Traffic.” Please reselect the object and, whenever possible, try to select its base. 请注意：目前存在选中大型多子物体建筑显示“无流量”的情况，请重新选择，尽量选择物体的底座 The mod currently provides: 这个模组目前提供： Unified selection for roads, railways, metro lines, and buildings 道路、铁路、地铁、建筑的统一选择 Visual feedback for hover highlighting and confirmed selection 悬停高亮与确认选中的视觉反馈 Traffic composition analysis for selected transport networks 选中交通网络后的流量构成分析 A compact in-game graphical statistics UI 紧凑的游戏内图形化统计界面 Current Features Hover highlighting for roads, railway lines, and metro lines 对道路、铁路线、地铁线路提供悬停高亮 Retains the vanilla selection behavior after confirming a selection 点击确认后保留原版选中表现 Clean hover outline for buildings 对建筑提供简洁的悬停描边 Displays the traffic composition of selected roads or tracks with a pie chart 用饼图展示所选道路或轨道的交通流量构成 Displays basic information for selected buildings in a graphical format 用图形化方式展示所选建筑的基础信息 Future Plans 未来展望 This is my first mod, so please excuse its shortcomings. Although I am a computer science student, game engineering is not my main field, and I am not yet fully proficient with C# or Unity. 这是我的第一个模组，有许多不足之处请见谅。尽管我是计算机科学专业的学生，但我的主科并不是游戏工程，我对于 C# 及 Unity 并不完全熟练。 If you have any feedback or suggestions, feel free to contact me. 有任何反馈和建议，欢迎与我联系。 In the future, I will try to implement: 未来会尝试实现： Building hover outlines closer to the vanilla game style 与原版相似的建筑悬停描边效果 An entry point next to the outside connection button 在对外连接按钮旁边添加入口 A UI style closer to other well-known mods 与其他知名模组相似的 UI Customizable item colors, fonts, sizes, and hotkeys 自定义条目颜色、字体、大小、快捷键

ChangeLog.Value: V1.4 Vanilla-like building hover effects, bug fixes
